hero.sub1: Plan. Teach. Assess. Improve. Everything connected.
hero.sub2: Sapiion connects curriculum design, teaching, assessment, student success and workplace learning into one continuous improvement cycle — so educational quality becomes an institutional strength, not an individual effort.
hero.ctaSecondary: Why Sapiion? See how it's different →

problem.h2: Education runs on disconnected tools. That has a cost.
problem.body: Most institutions use five or six separate systems — curriculum in one place, teaching in another, grades somewhere else, attendance in a third tool. None of them talk to each other.
points: Coordinators discover students are at risk only after grades have already failed
Teachers grade assignments disconnected from curriculum outcomes
Students receive marks but no insight into their own progress
Accreditation preparation takes months instead of days
problem.footer: This is not a technology problem. It is a connection problem.

solution.label: The platform
solution.body: An Educational Intelligence Platform built for professional education institutions. Everything that matters — in one place.

pillars.title: Curriculum Design
pillars.body: Design programmes that are alive — not locked in Word documents. Map learning outcomes to modules and rubric criteria. Ensure what you design is what gets taught.

pillars.title: Teaching Delivery
pillars.body: Plan lessons, track attendance and manage classes from the same environment where the curriculum lives. Less administration. More time teaching.

pillars.title: Assessment & Grading
pillars.body: Grade work using rubric criteria connected directly to learning outcomes. Every score becomes evidence of competency development — not just a number.

pillars.title: Student Success
pillars.body: See which students need attention before it is too late. Coordinators get real-time programme intelligence. Students see exactly where they stand.

forWhom.label: Designed for every role
forWhom.h2: Built for everyone in the institution.
forWhom.seeMore: See what Sapiion does for each role →

audiences.text: Real-time programme health. Accreditation evidence collected continuously. Know whether your programme delivers what it promises.
Early risk signals before students fail. A complete picture of every student — attendance, grades, outcomes, progression.
Your curriculum, your lessons, your grades and your students — in one place. Rubrics already built. Students you actually know.
Know what is due, where you stand and what you need to improve — before it becomes a problem.

ai.label: AI-assisted intelligence
ai.h2a: AI that starts with your programme —
ai.body: Most AI tools generate answers from general knowledge. Sapiion AI starts with educational context — your curriculum, your learning outcomes, your students' progress. That changes what AI can actually do.
ai.todayBody: Teachers select learning outcomes. Sapiion generates assessment questions aligned to those outcomes — each mapped back to a specific competency. Not generic content. Assessments connected to what students are actually expected to learn.

notLms.h2: This is not a Learning Management System (LMS).
notLms.body: Traditional LMS platforms focus on content delivery and course administration. Sapiion connects curriculum, teaching, assessment, workplace learning and institutional quality into one closed improvement loop. That is a different problem — and a different kind of platform.
notLms.sapiionFlow: Curriculum Design → Teaching → Assessment → Student Success → Workplace Learning → Educational Intelligence → Curriculum Improvement → ↺

cta.h2: See Sapiion working with your own programme.
cta.body: A demo takes 45 minutes. We set up a realistic example using your programme structure, your outcomes, your context. No slides. A real walkthrough.
